programme.desc: The FIA World Endurance Championship heads to Imola for a crucial early-season test as the world’s leading manufacturers and drivers take on one of Europe’s most demanding circuits. programme.title: Day 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour – Miami Beach Round 2026
programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour Miami Beach 2026 brings elite show jumping to a spectacular seaside setting, with the world’s top riders and horses competing across multiple classes. The highlight is the Grand Prix, where precision, speed and technique are key. Set against the iconic Miami skyline, the event combines top-level sport with a unique atmosphere on one of the Tour’s most distinctive stages.

programme.title: Day 1 - Two Phases – 1.40m - CHI AL SHAQAB Presented by Longines 2026
programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. The event brings together leading international riders competing in top-level Jumping and Dressage, including Olympic and world champions, highlighting precision, technique, and excellence on one of the sport’s most prestigious stages.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton, having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight. Brighton have won two of their last four away league games against Spurs, including a 4-1 victory last season. They’d only won one of their first nine visits between 1977 and 2020.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: EN EPL The Big Interview 2025/26 | E36 - Antoine Semenyo
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest names.

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: PSG vs Lyon - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lyon are the side Paris SG have faced most often under Luis Enrique among those against whom they have a 100% winning record in all competitions. None of the last 10 Ligue 1 games between Paris SG and Lyon at the Parc des Princes have ended in a draw, with PSG winning eight times and OL twice. This could be the PSG's 600th home victory in the top-flight.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.47 - Norwegian Strikers
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton, having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight. Brighton have won two of their last four away league games against Spurs, including a 4-1 victory last season. They’d only won one of their first nine visits between 1977 and 2020.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Buriram United (THA) vs Shabab Al Ahli (UAE) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - QF
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on beIN

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: PSG vs Lyon - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lyon are the side Paris SG have faced most often under Luis Enrique among those against whom they have a 100% winning record in all competitions. None of the last 10 Ligue 1 games between Paris SG and Lyon at the Parc des Princes have ended in a draw, with PSG winning eight times and OL twice. This could be the PSG's 600th home victory in the top-flight.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Saint-Etienne vs Bastia - Ligue 2 - J31 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Vingt equipes de deuxieme division française s'affrontent lors d'un marathon de 38 journees, toutes en quete de promotion en Ligue 1 pour defier les legendes du football hexagonal.

programme.title: Ep 32 Inside Fra - This is Paris - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Suivez de pres le parcours du Paris Saint-Germain avec une couverture complete des dernieres infos, des resultats et des prochains rendez-vous, alors que le club emblematique continue de marquer l'histoire de la Ligue 1 depuis 1974.

programme.title: Houston Rockets vs Los Angeles Sparks Lakers - NBA - Basketball 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Basketball. Plus grande ligue professionnelle de basket-ball au monde, la NBA offre une competition d'elite entre 30 equipes. La saison atteint son apogee lors des Finales NBA, ou les meilleures franchises s'affrontent pour le titre de champion.

programme.title: Doc Rse Au Dela Des Sommets FF Handisport - Documentaire
programme.desc: Sport, Debate, Paralympic games. Suivant les athletes paralympiques francais, cela met en lumiere leur entrainement, leur resilience et leur progression, jusqu' a des performances exceptionnelles sur la scene paralympique.

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.

programme.title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City since a 2-1 away win in May 2021. Manchester City have won four of their last five away Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 26 league visits to Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Everton vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs. Arsenal - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33

programme.title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
programme.desc: Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, keeping a clean sheet in both. Never in their history have the Galician side recorded three consecutive clean sheets against the Asturian side in the top-flight. Real Oviedo have not won any of their last nine away LaLiga games against Celta de Vigo, losing on their last six visits. This is their worst run of consecutive away defeats against the Vigo team in the competition's history.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Aston Villa have lost just one of their last 13 league games against Sunderland, going down 3-1 at the Stadium of Light in January 2016. Sunderland haven’t won any of their last six away league games against Aston Villa. This is their first visit since a 2-1 loss in the Championship in November 2017, and their first in the Premier League since a 2-2 draw in August 2015.

programme.title: Strasbourg vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Strasbourg are the side against whom Rennes have won most often in Ligue 1. Rennes have won their last two top-flight matches against Strasbourg. Strasbourg have won three of their last four home games against Rennes in Ligue 1, as many as they had in their previous 10 such matches.

programme.desc: Olympique de Marseille have beaten Lorient more than any other side in Ligue 1, boasting a 60% win rate against them, which is also more than any other team. programme.title: Rafael Jodar vs Arthur Fils - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
programme.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. programme.title: Mariano Navone (ARG) vs Daniel Merida (ESP) - Final - ATP 250 - Tiriac Open, Bucharest Romania - 202
programme.desc: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

programme.title: Andrey Rublev vs Arthur Fils - Singles Final - Day 7 - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell

programme.title: Aix vs Saint-Raphaël - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Limoges vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Sailiya vs Al Rayyan - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W12

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1
programme.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Flavio Cobolli ( ITA ) vs Ben Shelton ( USA ) - Singles Final - Day 7 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.

programme.title: Race 1 - Red Bull Ring Round - ADAC-GT4 2026
Stvsetienne vs Troyes - French Ligue 2 - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

programme.title: Grenoble vs Le Mans - French Ligue 2 - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.
